name: Swordquest: Earthworld
description: Swordquest: Earthworld is a first-person perspective adventure game. The player navigates a series of interconnected rooms, each rendered as a static screen. The environment is largely composed of mundane, modern household settings; a living room, kitchen, bedroom, etc. The objective is to locate specific objects hidden within these rooms, and to solve riddles and puzzles presented via text on the screen. These riddles are cryptic, requiring the player to use logic and observation to deduce their meanings. Hidden clues and red herrings are scattered throughout the environment to mislead the player. Progress depends on identifying the correct items, understanding their purpose, and using them in the appropriate location. Successfully solving a riddle or using an item in the correct place triggers a text response, which may advance the narrative, provide additional clues, or open new areas to explore. Some items are visible within the environment, while others are hidden and require specific actions to reveal. The game focuses heavily on exploration, puzzle-solving, and textual interaction.

controls.x: Speak to NPC if in same room
